allow: PowerShell(npm install axios 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "--- env keys present? ---"; Select-String -Path .env -Pattern '^APP_NAME|^APP_URL' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://helpdesk.test/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if\($r.Content -match 'id="app"'\){ "Inertia root: OK" } else { "Inertia root: NOT FOUND" }; if\($r.Content -match 'data-page'\){ "data-page present: OK" }; \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern 'Mesa de Ayuda'\).Matches.Count } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if\($_.Exception.Response\){ $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem tests -Recurse -File | Select-Object Name; "---"; Test-Path tests/Pest.php; \(Get-Content composer.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).'require-dev'.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', ')
